heading: Guidelines and inspection of project facilities and technical assistance to transferred works operating entities
label: 510a Guidelines and inspection of project facilities and technical assistance to transferred works operating entities

children.heading: Development of guidelines
children.label: 1 Development of guidelines
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary in consultation with transferred works operating entities shall develop, consistent with existing transfer contracts, specific inspection guidelines for project facilities which are in proximity to urbanized areas and which could pose a risk to public safety or property damage if such project facilities were to fail.March 30, 2009

children.heading: Conduct of inspections
children.label: 2 Conduct of inspections
children.text: Not later than 3 years after , the Secretary shall conduct inspections of those project facilities, which are in proximity to urbanized areas and which could pose a risk to public safety or property damage if such facilities were to fail, using such specific inspection guidelines and criteria developed pursuant to paragraph (1). In selecting project facilities to inspect, the Secretary shall take into account the potential magnitude of public safety and economic damage posed by each project facility.March 30, 2009

children.heading: Treatment of costs
children.label: 3 Treatment of costs
children.text: The costs incurred by the Secretary in conducting these inspections shall be nonreimbursable.

provide recommendations to the transferred works operating entities for improvement of operation and maintenance processes, operating procedures including operation guidelines consistent with existing transfer contracts, and structural modifications to those transferred works;
determine an appropriate inspection frequency for such nondam project facilities which shall not exceed 6 years; and

provide, upon request of transferred work operating entities, local governments, or State agencies, information regarding potential hazards posed by existing or proposed residential, commercial, industrial or public-use development adjacent to project facilities.

children.heading: Technical assistance to transferred works operating entities
children.label: c Technical assistance to transferred works operating entities

children.heading: Authority of Secretary to provide technical assistance
children.label: 1 Authority of Secretary to provide technical assistance
A
children.text: Development of documented operating procedures for a project facility.

children.label: B
children.text: Development of documented emergency notification and response procedures for a project facility.

children.label: C
children.text: Development of facility inspection criteria for a project facility.

children.label: D
children.text: Development of a training program on operation and maintenance requirements and practices for a project facility for a transferred works operating entity’s workforce.

children.label: E
children.text: Development of a public outreach plan on the operation and risks associated with a project facility.

children.label: F
children.text: Development of any other plans or documentation which, in the judgment of the Secretary, will contribute to public safety and the sage operation of a project facility.

children.heading: Costs
children.label: 2 Costs
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to provide, on a non-reimbursable basis, up to 50 percent of the cost of such technical assistance, with the balance of such costs being advanced by the transferred works operating entity or other non-Federal source. The non-Federal 50 percent minimum cost share for such technical assistance may be in the form of in-lieu contributions of resources by the transferred works operating entity or other non-Federal source.
